note: BRAIN layer — Day 22 value delivery queue. Last BRAIN run was 2026-04-10. CRITICAL: All three warm-pipeline leads (Claire, Rob, Tom) have been in the INTERESTED stage for 15-22 days with no BRAIN confirmation of outcomes. HANDS must update actual statuses on 2026-04-22 (Tuesday). Outcomes are unknown — BRAIN provides the decision tree; HANDS must execute and log.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: proposal nudge sent ~2026-04-10. Final close was due ~2026-04-14. HANDS must check IMAP and update this field.
items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online booking system — self-reported lost customers

option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — zero monthly cost objection.

if_she_replied_yes_to_nudge.action: CONVERTED. Log £350 (Option B most likely). Write CHANGELOG.md — first campaign revenue conversion. Confirm delivery timeline: 3-4 working days. Send agreement or invoice. This is the campaign's first proof point.

if_she_replied_with_questions.action: Answer clearly. Fresha is free for the salon. Timeline is 3-4 working days. Keep response short and confident. One reply to close.

if_she_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Reply: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.' No further contact.

if_no_reply_to_nudge_or_final_close.action: Send ONE final close — 'Claire — happy to leave this with you. If the timing changes, you know where I am.' Then mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Do NOT resend proposal. Do NOT discount. This is the absolute last touchpoint.
if_no_reply_to_nudge_or_final_close.note: If final close was already sent ~2026-04-14: check IMAP to see if she replied since. If still silent by 2026-04-22: mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE without sending another message.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: nudge sent 2026-04-07. Final nudge was due 2026-04-13 if still silent. Close by 2026-04-15 if no reply.
items.reply_summary: Asked whether SSL/mobile can be bundled into full redesign. 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — upsell signal.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

if_replied_and_deal_alive.action: Scope doc or call. If he asked for the scope doc: send it today — three options laid out simply (A, B, C). If he wants to talk: offer a slot this week. Do not discount. Confirm same day.

if_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Thank him briefly. No further contact.

if_no_reply_and_final_close_not_yet_sent.action: Send final close — 'Rob — happy to leave it here. If things change and you want to revisit, you know where I am.' Then mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE.
if_no_reply_and_final_close_not_yet_sent.note: Do NOT discount or add new urgency.

items.status: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — last BRAIN-confirmed action: nudge sent 2026-04-08. Final nudge window was 2026-04-13. Close by 2026-04-14.
items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online quote form — customers told to ring instead

if_replied_and_wants_to_proceed.action: Confirm call slot Tuesday or Wednesday. Simple spec: quote form, 3-4 fields, email notification, mobile-friendly. Price: £100-150. Timeline: 2-3 days. Agree on the call and close this week.

if_replied_no.action: Mark LOST. Log in CRM. Brief and gracious reply.

if_no_reply_and_final_close_not_yet_sent.action: Send final close — 'Tom — going to leave this with you. If the quote form ever rises to the top of the list, you know where I am.' Then mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE.
if_no_reply_and_final_close_not_yet_sent.note: Simple job at a modest price — Tom was genuinely interested. The silence is most likely busyness, not rejection.

summary.overdue_description: All three warm-pipeline leads have been in OUTCOME_UNKNOWN state since 2026-04-10. HANDS must check IMAP on 2026-04-22 and log outcomes before any other activity.

pipeline_value_estimate.total_range: £800-1,200 if all three are still alive and convert

conversion_probability_post_easter.lead_22_rob: LOW-MEDIUM — 12 days since nudge. Easter may mean he simply didn't see it. Check for a buried reply.
conversion_probability_post_easter.lead_1_tom: LOW — 11 days since nudge. Trades people either decide fast or move on. If no reply by now, likely lost.

summary.hands_update_required: CRITICAL. Update this file with actual outcome_field values after IMAP check on 2026-04-22: 'CONVERTED', 'LOST', 'LOST_NO_RESPONSE', or 'STILL_LIVE'. Write CHANGELOG.md if any deal converts — even one conversion validates the entire campaign model.
